subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! The rabble multitude of the world hath arisen with utmost earnestness and endeavor to extinguish the Light of the Ancient King [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد همج رعاع عالم بر اطفاء نور مالک قدم قیام نموده اند و بکمال جد و جهد
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
